content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Engineer
description: Legendary Anshin class mod for Axton the Commando, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Battlefront, Resourceful, Sentry, Impact, Able. Greatly boosts turret stats.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: boosts turret damage by +66% and turret fire rate by +58%.
special.title: Engineered for perfection.
